title: Release Gates, Migration, Recovery, Support, and Defense · Guided Program Studio
summary: A museum puzzle team incrementally builds production release, rollback, and residual-risk defense from original seeded fixtures while retaining earlier Python, graph, determinism, accessibility, testing, performance, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of production release, rollback, and residual-risk defense while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Require schema, order, duplication, source, model, algorithm, native GUI, accessibility, performance, security, package, and learner-flow gates.
Compare behavior, saves, settings, key maps, artifacts, and accessibility across upgrades with rollback-safe migrations.
Rehearse corrupted state, cancelled work, missing resources, display failure, bad release, rollback, and last-good restoration.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-production-defense-nl5ate
# Competency: maze-production-defense.
# Case 6498: a low-vision player session.
# Operating constraint: event-loop work must remain cancellable.
# Changed case: change the grid dimensions and preserve every invariant.
def evidence_maze_production_defense_nl5ate(release_gates: int = 12, passed_gates: int = 12, rehearsed_failures: int = 6, open_critical_barriers: int = 0, rollback_minutes: int = 4) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_nl5ate = "nl5ate-eta5ln-6498"
    assert evidence_variant_nl5ate
    evidence_axes_nl5ate = (
        "gridnl5ate",
        "topology6498",
        "searcheta5ln",
        "eventnl5ate6498",
        "access6498nl5ate",
        "recoveryeta5ln6498",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_nl5ate)) == 6
    if release_gates < 8 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-gate"
    if rehearsed_failures < 4 or open_critical_barriers > 0:
        return False, open_critical_barriers, "recovery-gap"
    if rollback_minutes < 0 or rollback_minutes > 15:
        return False, rollback_minutes, "rollback-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-maze-release"
